rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 1. PLAINTIFF ADVANCE INHERITANCE, INC.'s Motion For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor Off Calendar. The Court received Defendant Wheetley's Notice of Filing of Bankruptcy. All proceedings in this action are stayed pursuant to U.S. Bankruptcy Code § 362. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Expunge Notice Of Pending Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 2. INTERVENOR MF FUND III, LP's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pending Action GRANTED. Plaintiff's notice of pendency of action failed to comply with various statutory requirements. (See CCP §405.21-405.23.) = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA GARCIA et al VS. HOWARD OUM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 3. PLAINTIFFS MARIA GARCIA and DENIS GARCIA's Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions CONTINUED to November 21, 2014, on the Court's own motion. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 4. DEFENDANTS CHEUK YAN and TINA YAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff's complaint states sufficient facts to put defendants on notice as to the alleged fraudulent conveyance causes of action. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel (1) Answers To Form And Special Interrogatories, (2) Production Of Documents, And (3) For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 4. Motion To Compel (1) Answers To Form And Special Interrogatories, (2) Production Of Documents, And (3) For Sanctions GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: JANET LENZINI et al VS. RONALD L. VANINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant To Comply With Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFFS JANET LENZINI and JANE ARONOWICZ's Motion To Compel Defendant To Comply With Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction GRANTED. The Court orders Defendant to pay $1740 in sanctions and fees. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ARES PAPAGEORGE VS. LAMBROS G LAMBRACOS et al

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA MIRANDA VS. JESSICA KRIEGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Response To Discovery; For An Order Deeming Matters Admitted; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 9. DEFENDANT GESSIKA KRIEGER's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery; For An Order Deeming Matters Admitted; And For Sanctions GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to file timely responses within five days. Plaintiff is ordered to file responses by November 7, 2014. Plaintiff is to pay sanctions in the amount of $1,950. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON VS. MARZINE M. PARKER JR. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 10. DEFENDANT ETHEL HATFIELD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. A motion to quash service is the proper method to challenge the sufficiency of the complaint in an unlawful detainer action. (See Delta Imports, Inc. v. Mun.Ct. (Missimer) (1983) 146 Cal.App.3d 1033, 1036.) = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: KDF POST STREET, LP VS. JEFF BEASLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 03, 2014 line 11. PLAINTIFF KDF POST STREET, LP's Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED. Defendant failed to file timely responses. Defendant is to pay $630 in sanctions and fees. = (501/LOT)
